description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, wooden agricultural building with a steep gable roof clad in red metal panels. The structure features three rectangular skylight windows evenly spaced along the roof, providing natural light to the interior. On one side, there is a large double barn door at ground level, likely for livestock or equipment access, and a covered open bay supported by wooden posts. The opposite side has a single wooden door and an exterior staircase leading to a raised entry, suggesting a possible loft or storage area above. The walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, and the overall design is functional with minimal decorative elements. The building sits elevated on posts at one end, with a simple wooden railing along the staircase.
description: A wooden cowshed with a red gable roof, three skylight windows, large barn doors, and an exterior staircase leading to a raised entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large double barn doors, open bay, and three skylight windows on the red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the full length of the red roof and plain wooden wall with no openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a single wooden door, exterior staircase, and a small window beneath the raised entry.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end with the staircase, raised entry door, and three skylight windows visible on the roof.
attribute_door_style: double wooden barn door and single wooden plank door
attribute_window_presence: three rectangular skylight windows on the roof, one small rectangular window on the rear wall
